About us

A small crew that knows its craft.
We opened because we were tired of cuts done "at speed". Here it's different.

RAVEN is four chairs, the smell of leather and coffee, vinyl on the turntable and barbers who remember your name. We don't chase volume — we take only as many clients as we can do right.

Lukas

Master barber · founder

Mateo

Barber · beards

Adrian

Barber · classic cuts
